summary: Iteration 25 - Admin Procedures Module Testing Complete. Backend: All 24 tests passed (CRUD procedures, steps, quick_actions, file upload/download to cloud storage, chat actions, reference data endpoints). Frontend: Admin dashboard (/admin/procedures) with dark theme, sidebar, stats, and procedure list with country flags working. Procedure builder (/admin/procedures/nouvelle) shows all 5 sections (Info, Steps, Chat, Quick Actions, Files). Edit procedure (/admin/procedures/modifier/{id}) loads all data correctly including steps, files, and quick actions.

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<option>' - hydration warning from React dev tools, cosmetic only, does not affect functionality

backend_api: GET /api/procedures - Returns paginated list with enriched data (category_name, country_name, country_flag, steps, files)
GET /api/procedures/stats - Returns total, published, drafts, active, total_files, total_chat_actions, total_views, by_category, by_country (admin only)
GET /api/procedures/62cfc5a7-0bee-4179-9996-ac31366f5c98 - Returns existing procedure with 3 steps and 1 file
POST /api/procedures - Creates procedure with steps and quick_actions, returns version=1
PUT /api/procedures/{id} - Updates procedure and increments version
POST /api/procedures/{id}/files - Uploads file to cloud storage
GET /api/chat-actions - Returns list with country_name and country_flag
frontend_ui: Login page at /connexion - Email/password form, login button works
Admin procedures dashboard at /admin/procedures - Sidebar with dark theme (zinc-950 bg, #FF6600 accents)
Dashboard shows stats: Total, Publiees, Brouillons, Vues totales
Dashboard shows procedure list with country flags from flagcdn.com
Dashboard has search input, category/country filters, create button
Create procedure at /admin/procedures/nouvelle - All 5 sections present
Section 1: INFORMATIONS DE PROCEDURE - Title, description, category, keywords, country, language, complexity, active toggle
Section 2: ETAPES DE PROCEDURE - Drag & drop steps with required documents
Section 3: OPTIONS DE CHAT - Chat actions list
Section 4: BULLES RAPIDES - Quick actions with action_type select
Section 5: CONDITIONS ET FICHIERS - File upload (disabled until saved), file list with download
Edit procedure at /admin/procedures/modifier/{id} - Loads title, description, category, country, steps, files, keywords, quick actions correctly
Procedure builder shows APERCU (preview) section with summary

critical_code_review_comments: Backend procedures.py properly handles enrichment with category_name, country_name, country_flag
Backend correctly increments version on update and maintains versions_history
Cloud storage integration via emergentintegrations working correctly for file uploads
Frontend ProcedureBuilder.js properly uses @dnd-kit for drag & drop steps
Frontend AdminProceduresDashboard.js shows dark theme with proper #FF6600 accent color
data-testid attributes present on all key elements for testing
Minor: Console hydration warnings about span in select/option (cosmetic, React dev tools artifact)
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created during pytest were cleaned up via cleanup test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin procedures module fully implemented and tested. Dashboard at /admin/procedures with dark zinc-950 theme. Procedure builder at /admin/procedures/nouvelle or /admin/procedures/modifier/{id}. Uses @dnd-kit for drag & drop steps. Cloud storage via emergentintegrations for file uploads. Chat actions are global (at /api/chat-actions). Quick actions are embedded in procedure. Login route is /connexion (not /login). Existing test procedure ID: 62cfc5a7-0bee-4179-9996-ac31366f5c98 (Visa visiteur Canada with 3 steps and 1 file).
